# Generated File Templates

This document describes the files generated by `scripts/main.ts` for reference. The agent can read this to explain what will be created without running the script.

## Variable Substitutions

| Variable | Source | Example |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `{name}` | `--name` flag | `my-skills` |
| `{owner}` | `--owner` flag | `Jane Doe` |
| `{email}` | `--email` flag | `jane@example.com` |
| `{description}` | `--description` flag | `AI-powered content tools` |
| `{prefix}` | `--prefix` flag | `my-` |
| `{githubOwner}` | `--github-owner` flag | `janedoe` |

## Generated Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` | Plugin manifest for Claude Code marketplace discovery |
| `package.json` | Node.js monorepo root (private, type: module) |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Project instructions loaded by Claude Code |
| `README.md` | English documentation with install commands |
| `README.zh.md` | Chinese documentation |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | English release notes |
| `CHANGELOG.zh.md` | Chinese release notes |
| `.releaserc.yml` | Release automation config (targets `skills/*`) |
| `.gitignore` | Standard Node.js ignores |
| `docs/creating-skills.md` | Guide for adding new skills (uses custom prefix) |
| `.github/workflows/test.yml` | Minimal GitHub Actions CI |
| `skills/.gitkeep` | Preserves empty skills directory in git |
| `packages/.gitkeep` | Preserves empty packages directory in git |

## Post-Scaffold Customization

After generation, users typically:
1. Edit `CLAUDE.md` to add project-specific instructions
2. Add dependencies to `package.json` as needed
3. Create their first skill directory
4. Set up a GitHub remote and push
